subcodes.first_line: O ye friends! This is the day of unity and concord, and of sincerity in the Cause of the resplendent Orb of all horizons. This is the time to offer up one's life in sacrifice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الیوم یوم اتحاد و اتفاقست و خلوص در امر نیر آفاق وقت جانفشانیست و
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love and unity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @prayer for nearness to God
